action_description: A set of action to perform on the filtered assets
add_to_album_bottom_sheet_some_local_ass: Some local assets could not be added to album

admin.add_exclusion_pattern_description: Add exclusion patterns. Globbing using *, **, and ? is supported. To ignore all files in any directory named "Raw", use "**/Raw/**". To ignore all files ending in ".tif", use "**/*.tif". To ignore an absolute path, use "/path/to/ignore/**".
admin.asset_offline_description: This external library asset is no longer found on disk and has been moved to the bin. If the file was moved within the library, check your timeline for the new corresponding asset. To restore this asset, please ensure that the file path below can be accessed by Immich and scan the library.
admin.authentication_settings_description: Manage password, OAuth, and other authentication settings
admin.authentication_settings_disable_all: Are you sure you want to disable all login methods? Login will be completely disabled.
admin.backup_keep_last_amount: Amount of previous dumps to keep
admin.backup_onboarding_1_description: offsite copy in the cloud or at another physical location.
admin.backup_onboarding_2_description: local copies on different devices. This includes the main files and a backup of those files locally.
admin.backup_onboarding_3_description: total copies of your data, including the original files. This includes 1 offsite copy and 2 local copies.
admin.backup_onboarding_description: A <backblaze-link>3-2-1 backup strategy</backblaze-link> is recommended to protect your data. You should keep copies of your uploaded photos/videos as well as the Immich database for a comprehensive backup solution.
admin.backup_onboarding_footer: For more information about backing up Immich, please refer to the <link>documentation</link>.
admin.config_set_by_file: Config is currently set by a config file
admin.confirm_delete_library: Are you sure you want to delete {library} library?
admin.confirm_delete_library_assets: Are you sure you want to delete this library? This will delete {count, plural, one {# contained asset} other {all # contained assets}} from Immich and cannot be undone. Files will remain on disk.
admin.confirm_reprocess_all_faces: Are you sure you want to reprocess all faces? This will also clear named people.
admin.confirm_user_password_reset: Are you sure you want to reset {user}'s password?
admin.confirm_user_pin_code_reset: Are you sure you want to reset {user}'s PIN code?
admin.copy_config_to_clipboard_description: Copy the current system config as a JSON object to the clipboard
admin.cron_expression_description: Set the scanning interval using the cron format. For more information please refer to e.g. <link>Crontab Guru</link>
admin.duplicate_detection_job_description: Run machine learning on assets to detect similar images. Relies on Smart Search
admin.exclusion_pattern_description: Exclusion patterns lets you ignore files and folders when scanning your library. This is useful if you have folders that contain files you don't want to import, such as RAW files.
admin.export_config_as_json_description: Download the current system config as a JSON file
admin.face_detection_description: Detect the faces in assets using machine learning. For videos, only the thumbnail is considered. "Refresh" (re-)processes all assets. "Reset" additionally clears all current face data. "Missing" queues assets that haven't been processed yet. Detected faces will be queued for Facial Recognition after Face Detection is complete, grouping them into existing or new people.
admin.facial_recognition_job_description: Group detected faces into people. This step runs after Face Detection is complete. "Reset" (re-)clusters all faces. "Missing" queues faces that don't have a person assigned.
admin.force_delete_user_warning: WARNING: This will immediately remove the user and all assets. This cannot be undone and the files cannot be recovered.
admin.image_format_description: WebP produces smaller files than JPEG, but is slower to encode.
admin.image_fullsize_description: Full-size image with stripped metadata, used when zoomed in
admin.image_fullsize_enabled_description: Generate full-size image for non-web-friendly formats. When "Prefer embedded preview" is enabled, embedded previews are used directly without conversion. Does not affect web-friendly formats like JPEG.
admin.image_fullsize_quality_description: Full-size image quality from 1-100. Higher is better, but produces larger files.
admin.image_prefer_embedded_preview_setting_de: Use embedded previews in RAW photos as the input to image processing and when available. This can produce more accurate colours for some images, but the quality of the preview is camera-dependent and the image may have more compression artifacts.
admin.image_prefer_wide_gamut_setting_descript: Use Display P3 for thumbnails. This better preserves the vibrance of images with wide colourspaces, but images may appear differently on old devices with an old browser version. sRGB images are kept as sRGB to avoid colour shifts.
admin.image_preview_description: Medium-size image with stripped metadata, used when viewing a single asset and for machine learning
admin.image_preview_quality_description: Preview quality from 1-100. Higher is better, but produces larger files and can reduce app responsiveness. Setting a low value may affect machine learning quality.
admin.image_progressive_description: Encode JPEG images progressively for gradual loading display. This has no effect on WebP images.
admin.image_resolution_description: Higher resolutions can preserve more detail but take longer to encode, have larger file sizes and can reduce app responsiveness.
admin.image_settings_description: Manage the quality and resolution of generated images
admin.image_thumbnail_description: Small thumbnail with stripped metadata, used when viewing groups of photos like the main timeline
admin.image_thumbnail_quality_description: Thumbnail quality from 1-100. Higher is better, but produces larger files and can reduce app responsiveness.
admin.import_config_from_json_description: Import system config by uploading a JSON config file
admin.integrity_checks_checksum_files_percenta: Configure the maximum percentage between 0.01 and 1 for how much the checksum check should run each interval.
admin.integrity_checks_checksum_files_time_lim: Configure the maximum duration for which the checksum check should run each interval. (ms)
admin.integrity_checks_missing_files_descripti: Configure the frequency and enable or disable the missing files check
admin.integrity_checks_untracked_files_descrip: Configure the frequency and enable or disable the untracked files check
admin.library_folder_description: Specify a folder to import. This folder, including subfolders, will be scanned for images and videos.
admin.library_remove_exclusion_pattern_prompt: Are you sure you want to remove this exclusion pattern?
admin.library_remove_folder_prompt: Are you sure you want to remove this import folder?
admin.library_tasks_description: Scan external libraries for new and/or changed assets
admin.library_watching_enable_description: Watch external libraries for file changes
admin.logging_level_description: When enabled, what log level to use.
admin.machine_learning_availability_checks_des: Automatically detect and prefer available machine learning servers
admin.machine_learning_availability_checks_int: Interval in milliseconds between availability checks
admin.machine_learning_availability_checks_tim: Timeout in milliseconds for availability checks
admin.machine_learning_clip_model_description: The name of a CLIP model listed <link>here</link>. Note that you must re-run the 'Smart Search' job for all images upon changing a model.
admin.machine_learning_duplicate_detection_ena: If disabled, exactly identical assets will still be de-duplicated.
admin.machine_learning_duplicate_detection_set: Use CLIP embeddings to find likely duplicates
admin.machine_learning_enabled_description: If disabled, all ML features will be disabled regardless of the below settings.
admin.machine_learning_facial_recognition_desc: Detect, recognise and group faces in images
admin.machine_learning_facial_recognition_mode: Models are listed in descending order of size. Larger models are slower and use more memory, but produce better results. Note that you must re-run the Face Detection job for all images upon changing a model.
admin.machine_learning_facial_recognition_sett: If disabled, images will not be encoded for facial recognition and will not populate the People section in the Explore page.
admin.machine_learning_max_detection_distance_: Maximum distance between two images to consider them duplicates, ranging from 0.001-0.1. Higher values will detect more duplicates, but may result in false positives.
admin.machine_learning_max_recognition_distanc: Maximum distance between two faces to be considered the same person, ranging from 0-2. Lowering this can prevent labializing two people as the same person, while raising it can prevent labelling the same person as two different people. Note that it is easier to merge two people than to split one person in two, so err on the side of a lower threshold when possible.
admin.machine_learning_min_detection_score_des: Minimum confidence score for a face to be detected from 0-1. Lower values will detect more faces but may result in false positives.
admin.machine_learning_min_recognized_faces_de: The minimum number of recognised faces for a person to be created. Increasing this makes Facial Recognition more precise at the cost of increasing the chance that a face is not assigned to a person.
admin.machine_learning_ocr_description: Use machine learning to recognise text in images
admin.machine_learning_ocr_enabled_description: If disabled, images will not undergo text recognition.
admin.machine_learning_ocr_max_resolution_desc: Previews above this resolution will be resized while preserving aspect ratio. Higher values are more accurate, but take longer to process and use more memory.
admin.machine_learning_ocr_min_detection_score: Minimum confidence score for text to be detected from 0-1. Lower values will detect more text but may result in false positives.
admin.machine_learning_ocr_min_score_recogniti: Minimum confidence score for detected text to be recognised from 0-1. Lower values will recognise more text but may result in false positives.
admin.machine_learning_ocr_model_description: Server models are more accurate than mobile models, but take longer to process and use more memory.
admin.machine_learning_settings_description: Manage machine learning features and settings
admin.machine_learning_smart_search_descriptio: Search for images semantically using CLIP embeddings
admin.machine_learning_smart_search_enabled_de: If disabled, images will not be encoded for smart search.
admin.machine_learning_url_description: The URL of the machine learning server. If more than one URL is provided, each server will be attempted one-at-a-time until one responds successfully, in order from first to last. Servers that don't respond will be temporarily ignored until they come back online.
admin.maintenance_delete_backup_description: This file will be irrevocably deleted.
admin.maintenance_integrity_checksum_mismatch_: Files whose on-disk checksum mismatches the checksum which Immich had stored in its database.
admin.maintenance_integrity_missing_file_descr: Files that Immich has tracked in its database but do not exist on the file system.
admin.maintenance_integrity_untracked_file_des: Files in Immich's directories that Immich does not have any record of.
admin.maintenance_restore_backup_description: Immich will be wiped and restored from the chosen backup. A backup will be created before continuing.
admin.maintenance_restore_backup_different_ver: This backup was created with a different version of Immich!
admin.maintenance_restore_database_backup_desc: Rollback to an earlier database state using a backup file
admin.maintenance_upload_backup_error: Could not upload backup, is it an .sql/.sql.gz file?
admin.manage_concurrency_description: Navigate to the jobs page to manage job concurrency
admin.map_implications: The map feature relies on an external tile service (tiles.immich.cloud)
admin.map_style_description: URL to a style.json map theme
admin.metadata_extraction_job_description: Extract metadata information from each asset, such as GPS, faces and resolution
admin.metadata_faces_import_setting_descriptio: Import faces from image EXIF data and sidecar files
admin.migration_job_description: Migrate thumbnails for assets and faces to the latest folder structure
admin.nightly_tasks_cluster_faces_setting_desc: Run facial recognition on newly detected faces
admin.nightly_tasks_database_cleanup_setting_d: Clean up old, expired data from the database
admin.nightly_tasks_missing_thumbnails_setting: Queue assets without thumbnails for thumbnail generation
admin.nightly_tasks_start_time_setting_descrip: The time at which the server starts running the nightly tasks
admin.nightly_tasks_sync_quota_usage_setting_d: Update user storage quota, based on current usage
admin.note_apply_storage_label_previous_assets: Note: To apply the Storage Label to previously uploaded assets, run the
admin.note_cannot_be_changed_later: NOTE: This cannot be changed later!
admin.notification_email_from_address_descript: Sender email address, for example: "Immich Photo Server <noreply@example.com>". Make sure to use an address you're allowed to send emails from.
admin.notification_email_host_description: Address of the email server (e.g. smtp.immich.app)
admin.notification_email_ignore_certificate_er: Ignore TLS certificate validation errors (not recommended)
admin.notification_email_password_description: Password to use when authenticating with the email server
admin.notification_email_port_description: Port of the email server (e.g 25, 465, or 587)
admin.notification_email_test_email_failed: Failed to send test email, check your values
admin.notification_email_test_email_sent: A test email has been sent to {email}. Please check your inbox.
admin.notification_email_username_description: Username to use when authenticating with the email server
admin.oauth_allow_insecure_requests_descriptio: WARNING: This disables TLS certificate validation for OAuth requests and may expose you to MITM attacks.
admin.oauth_auto_launch_description: Start the OAuth login flow automatically upon navigating to the login page
admin.oauth_auto_register_description: Automatically register new users after signing in with OAuth
admin.oauth_client_secret_description: Required for confidential client, or if PKCE (Proof Key for Code Exchange) is not supported for public client.
admin.oauth_end_session_url_description: Redirect the user to this URI when they log out.
admin.oauth_mobile_redirect_uri_override_descr: Enable when OAuth provider does not allow a mobile URI, like ''{callback}''
admin.oauth_role_claim_description: Automatically grant admin access based on the presence of this claim. The claim may have either 'user' or 'admin'.
admin.oauth_settings_more_details: For more details about this feature, refer to the <link>docs</link>.
admin.oauth_storage_label_claim_description: Automatically set the user's storage label to the value of this claim.
admin.oauth_storage_quota_claim_description: Automatically set the user's storage quota to the value of this claim.
admin.oauth_storage_quota_default_description: Quota in GiB to be used when no claim is provided.
admin.ocr_job_description: Use machine learning to recognise text in images
admin.registration_description: Since you are the first user on the system, you will be assigned as the Admin and are responsible for administrative tasks, and additional users will be created by you.
admin.require_password_change_on_login: Require user to change password on first login
admin.reset_settings_to_recent_saved: Reset settings to the recent saved settings
admin.server_public_users_description: All users (name and email) are listed when adding a user to shared albums. When disabled, the user list will only be available to admin users.
admin.server_welcome_message_description: A message that is displayed on the login page.
admin.sidecar_job_description: Discover or synchronise sidecar metadata from the filesystem
admin.slideshow_duration_description: Number of seconds to display each image
admin.smart_search_job_description: Run machine learning on assets to support smart search
admin.storage_template_date_time_description: Asset's creation timestamp is used for the datetime information
admin.storage_template_hash_verification_enabl: Enables hash verification, don't disable this unless you're certain of the implications
admin.storage_template_migration_description: Apply the current <link>{template}</link> to previously uploaded assets
admin.storage_template_migration_info: The storage template will convert all extensions to lowercase. Template changes will only apply to new assets. To retroactively apply the template to previously uploaded assets, run the <link>{job}</link>.
admin.storage_template_more_details: For more details about this feature, refer to the <template-link>Storage Template</template-link> and its <implications-link>implications</implications-link>
admin.storage_template_onboarding_description_: When enabled, this feature will auto-organise files based on a user-defined template. For more information, please see the <link>documentation</link>.
admin.storage_template_path_length: Approximate path length limit: {length, number}/{limit, number}
admin.storage_template_settings_description: Manage the folder structure and file name of the upload asset
admin.template_email_available_tags: You can use the following variables in your template: {tags}
admin.template_email_if_empty: If the template is empty, the default email will be used.
admin.theme_custom_css_settings_description: Cascading Style Sheets allow the design of Immich to be customised.
admin.theme_settings_description: Manage customisation of the Immich web interface
admin.thumbnail_generation_job_description: Generate large, small and blurred thumbnails for each asset, as well as thumbnails for each person
admin.transcoding_acceleration_api_description: The API that will interact with your device to accelerate transcoding. This setting is 'best effort': it will fallback to software transcoding on failure. VP9 may or may not work depending on your hardware.
admin.transcoding_acceleration_qsv: Quick Sync (requires 7th gen Intel CPU or later)
admin.transcoding_accepted_audio_codecs_descri: Select which audio codecs do not need to be transcoded. Only used for certain transcode policies.
admin.transcoding_accepted_containers_descript: Select which container formats do not need to be remuxed to MP4. Only used for certain transcode policies.
admin.transcoding_accepted_video_codecs_descri: Select which video codecs do not need to be transcoded. Only used for certain transcode policies.
admin.transcoding_advanced_options_description: Options most users should not need to change
admin.transcoding_audio_codec_description: Opus is the highest quality option, but has lower compatibility with old devices or software.
admin.transcoding_bitrate_description: Videos higher than max bitrate or not in an accepted format
admin.transcoding_codecs_learn_more: To learn more about the terminology used here, refer to FFmpeg documentation for <h264-link>H.264 codec</h264-link>, <hevc-link>HEVC codec</hevc-link> and <vp9-link>VP9 codec</vp9-link>.
admin.transcoding_constant_quality_mode_descri: ICQ is better than CQP, but some hardware acceleration devices do not support this mode. Setting this option will prefer the specified mode when using quality-based encoding. Ignored by NVENC as it does not support ICQ.
admin.transcoding_constant_rate_factor_descrip: Video quality level. Typical values are 23 for H.264, 28 for HEVC, 31 for VP9, and 35 for AV1. Lower is better, but produces larger files.
admin.transcoding_disabled_description: Don't transcode any videos, may break playback on some clients
admin.transcoding_encoding_options_description: Set codecs, resolution, quality and other options for the encoded videos
admin.transcoding_hardware_acceleration_descri: Experimental: faster transcoding but may reduce quality at same bitrate
admin.transcoding_hardware_decoding_setting_de: Enables end-to-end acceleration instead of only accelerating encoding. May not work on all videos.
admin.transcoding_max_b_frames_description: Higher values improve compression efficiency, but slow down encoding. May not be compatible with hardware acceleration on older devices. 0 disables B-frames, while -1 sets this value automatically.
admin.transcoding_max_bitrate_description: Setting a max bitrate can make file sizes more predictable at a minor cost to quality. At 720p, typical values are 2600 kbit/s for VP9 or HEVC, or 4500 kbit/s for H.264. Disabled if set to 0. When no unit is specified, k (for kbit/s) is assumed; therefore 5000, 5000k, and 5M (for Mbit/s) are equivalent.
admin.transcoding_max_keyframe_interval_descri: Sets the maximum frame distance between keyframes. Lower values worsen compression efficiency, but improve seek times and may improve quality in scenes with fast movement. 0 sets this value automatically.
admin.transcoding_optimal_description: Videos higher than target resolution or not in an accepted format
admin.transcoding_policy_description: Set when a video will be transcoded
admin.transcoding_preferred_hardware_device_de: Applies only to VAAPI and QSV. Sets the dri node used for hardware transcoding.
admin.transcoding_preset_preset_description: Compression speed. Slower presets produce smaller files, and increase quality when targeting a certain bitrate. VP9 ignores speeds above 'faster'.
admin.transcoding_realtime_description: Allows transcoding to be performed in real-time as the video is being streamed. Enables quality switching, but may cause higher playback latency and stuttering depending on server capabilities.
admin.transcoding_realtime_enabled_description: If disabled, the server will refuse to start new real-time transcoding sessions.
admin.transcoding_realtime_resolutions_descrip: The resolutions offered for real-time transcoding. Higher resolutions may cause playback issues if the server cannot transcode them quickly enough.
admin.transcoding_realtime_video_codecs_descri: The video codecs offered for real-time transcoding. Clients will choose the best option they support during playback. AV1 is more efficient than HEVC, which is more efficient than H.264. When using hardware acceleration, only select the codecs the accelerator can encode. When using software transcoding, note that H.264 is faster than AV1, which is faster than HEVC.
admin.transcoding_reference_frames_description: The number of frames to reference when compressing a given frame. Higher values improve compression efficiency, but slow down encoding. 0 sets this value automatically.
admin.transcoding_required_description: Only videos not in an accepted format
admin.transcoding_settings_description: Manage which videos to transcode and how to process them
admin.transcoding_target_resolution_descriptio: Higher resolutions can preserve more detail but take longer to encode, have larger file sizes, and can reduce app responsiveness.
admin.transcoding_temporal_aq_description: Applies only to NVENC. Temporal Adaptive Quantisation increases quality of high-detail, low-motion scenes. May not be compatible with older devices.
admin.transcoding_threads_description: Higher values lead to faster encoding, but leave less room for the server to process other tasks while active. This value should not be more than the number of CPU cores. Maximises utilisation if set to 0.
admin.transcoding_tone_mapping_description: Attempts to preserve the appearance of HDR videos when converted to SDR. Each algorithm makes different trade-offs for colour, detail and brightness. Hable preserves detail, Mobius preserves colour, and Reinhard preserves brightness.
admin.transcoding_transcode_policy_description: Policy for when a video should be transcoded. HDR videos and videos with a pixel format other than YUV 4:2:0 will always be transcoded (except if transcoding is disabled).
admin.transcoding_two_pass_encoding_setting_de: Transcode in two passes to produce better encoded videos. When max bitrate is enabled (required for it to work with H.264 and HEVC), this mode uses a bitrate range based on the max bitrate and ignores CRF. For VP9, CRF can be used if max bitrate is disabled.
admin.transcoding_video_codec_description: VP9 has high efficiency and web compatibility, but takes longer to transcode. HEVC performs similarly, but has lower web compatibility. H.264 is widely compatible and quick to transcode, but produces much larger files. AV1 is the most efficient codec but lacks support on older devices.
admin.trash_number_of_days_description: Number of days to keep the assets in the bin before permanently removing them
admin.unlink_all_oauth_accounts_description: Remember to unlink all OAuth accounts before migrating to a new provider.
admin.unlink_all_oauth_accounts_prompt: Are you sure you want to unlink all OAuth accounts? This will reset the OAuth ID for each user and cannot be undone.
admin.user_delete_delay: {user}'s account and assets will be scheduled for permanent deletion in {delay, plural, one {# day} other {# days}}.
admin.user_delete_delay_settings_description: Number of days after removal to permanently delete a user's account and assets. The user deletion job runs at midnight to check for users that are ready for deletion. Changes to this setting will be evaluated at the next execution.
admin.user_delete_immediately: {user}'s account and assets will be queued for permanent deletion immediately.
admin.user_delete_immediately_checkbox: Queue user and assets for immediate deletion
admin.user_password_has_been_reset: The user's password has been reset:
admin.user_password_reset_description: Please provide the temporary password to the user and inform them they will need to change the password at their next login.
admin.user_restore_scheduled_removal: Restore user - scheduled removal on {date, date, long}
admin.version_check_channel_description: Pick the release channel you want to get version announcements for
admin.version_check_implications: The version check feature relies on periodic communication with {server}
admin.video_conversion_job_description: Transcode videos for wider compatibility with browsers and devices

advanced_settings_prefer_remote_subtitle: Some devices are painfully slow to load thumbnails from local assets. Activate this setting to load remote images instead.
advanced_settings_proxy_headers_subtitle: Define proxy headers Immich should send with each network request
advanced_settings_readonly_mode_subtitle: Enables the read-only mode where the photos can be only viewed, things like selecting multiple images, sharing, casting, delete are all disabled. Enable/Disable read-only via user avatar from the main screen
advanced_settings_sync_remote_deletions_: Automatically delete or restore an asset on this device when that action is taken on the web
age_months: Age {months, plural, one {# month} other {# months}}
age_year_months: Age 1 year, {months, plural, one {# month} other {# months}}
album_added_notification_setting_descrip: Receive an email notification when you are added to a shared album
album_delete_confirmation: Are you sure you want to delete the album {album}?
album_delete_confirmation_description: If this album is shared, other users will not be able to access it any more.
album_remove_user_confirmation: Are you sure you want to remove {user}?
album_search_not_found: No albums found matching your search
album_share_no_users: Looks like you have shared this album with all users or you don't have any users to share with.
album_updated_setting_description: Receive an email notification when a shared album has new assets
album_upload_assets: Upload assets from your computer and add to album
album_with_link_access: Let anyone with the link see photos and people in this album.
albums_count: {count, plural, one {{count, number} Album} other {{count, number} Albums}}
albums_default_sort_order_description: Initial asset sort order when creating new albums.
albums_feature_description: Collections of assets that can be shared with other users.
always_keep_photos_hint: Free Up Space will keep all photos on this device.
always_keep_videos_hint: Free Up Space will keep all videos on this device.
api_key_description: This value will only be shown once. Please be sure to copy it before closing the window.
api_key_empty: Your API Key name shouldn't be empty
app_bar_signout_dialog_content: Are you sure you want to sign out?
archive_size_description: Configure the archive size for downloads (in GiB)
are_you_sure_to_do_this: Are you sure you want to do this?
asset_not_found_on_device_ios: Asset not found on device. If you are using iCloud, the asset may be inaccessible due to bad file stored on iCloud
asset_not_found_on_icloud: Asset not found on iCloud. the asset may be inaccessible due to bad file stored on iCloud
asset_offline_description: This external asset is no longer found on disk. Please contact your Immich administrator for help.
assets_added_to_album_count: Added {count, plural, one {# asset} other {# assets}} to the album
assets_added_to_album_partial_count: Added {successCount} out of {totalCount} {totalCount, plural, one {asset} other {assets}} to the album
assets_added_to_albums_count: Added {assetTotal, plural, one {# asset} other {# assets}} to {albumTotal, plural, one {# album} other {# albums}}
assets_cannot_be_added_to_album_count: {count, plural, one {Asset} other {Assets}} cannot be added to the album
assets_cannot_be_added_to_albums: {count, plural, one {Asset} other {Assets}} cannot be added to any of the albums
assets_moved_to_trash_count: Moved {count, plural, one {# asset} other {# assets}} to trash
assets_permanently_deleted_count: Permanently deleted {count, plural, one {# asset} other {# assets}}
assets_removed_count: Removed {count, plural, one {# asset} other {# assets}}
assets_restore_confirmation: Are you sure you want to restore all your binned assets? You cannot undo this action! Note that any offline assets cannot be restored this way.
assets_restored_count: Restored {count, plural, one {# asset} other {# assets}}
assets_trashed_count: Binned {count, plural, one {# asset} other {# assets}}
assets_were_part_of_album_count: {count, plural, one {Asset was} other {Assets were}} already part of the album
assets_were_part_of_albums_count: {count, plural, one {Asset was} other {Assets were}} already part of the albums
automatic_endpoint_switching_subtitle: Connect locally over designated Wi-Fi when available and use alternative connections elsewhere
background_location_permission_content: In order to switch networks when running in the background, Immich must *always* have precise location access so the app can read the Wi-Fi network's name
backup_album_selection_page_albums_tap: Tap to include, double tap to exclude
backup_album_selection_page_assets_scatt: Assets can scatter across multiple albums. Thus, albums can be included or excluded during the backup process.
backup_controller_page_background_batter:
For the best background backup experience, please disable any battery optimisations restricting background activity for Immich.

Since this is device-specific, please lookup the required information for your device manufacturer.
backup_controller_page_remainder_sub: Remaining photos and videos to back up from selection
backup_controller_page_total_sub: All unique photos and videos from selected albums
battery_optimization_backup_reliability: Disabling battery optimisations can improve the reliability of background backup
biometric_locked_out: You are locked out of biometric authentication
biometric_not_available: Biometric authentication is not available on this device
birthdate_set_description: Date of birth is used to calculate the age of this person at the time of a photo.
bulk_delete_duplicates_confirmation: Are you sure you want to bulk delete {count, plural, one {# duplicate asset} other {# duplicate assets}}? This will keep the largest asset of each group and permanently delete all other duplicates. You cannot undo this action!
bulk_keep_duplicates_confirmation: Are you sure you want to keep {count, plural, one {# duplicate asset} other {# duplicate assets}}? This will resolve all duplicate groups without deleting anything.
bulk_trash_duplicates_confirmation: Are you sure you want to bulk trash {count, plural, one {# duplicate asset} other {# duplicate assets}}? This will keep the largest asset of each group and trash all other duplicates.

purchase_panel_info_1: Building Immich takes a lot of time and effort, and we have full-time engineers working on it to make it as good as we possibly can. Our mission is for open-source software and ethical business practices to become a sustainable income source for developers and to create a privacy-respecting ecosystem with real alternatives to exploitative cloud services.
purchase_panel_info_2: As we're committed not to add paywalls, this purchase will not grant you any additional features in Immich. We rely on users like you to support Immich's ongoing development.

setting_image_viewer_preview_subtitle: Enable to load a medium-resolution image. Disable to either directly load the original or only use the thumbnail.
setting_video_viewer_auto_play_subtitle: Automatically start playing videos when they are opened
setting_video_viewer_original_video_subt: When streaming a video from the server, play the original even when a transcode is available. May lead to buffering. Videos available locally are played in original quality regardless of this setting.
